name: e3_rewire_a_branch
prompt: only block the IP if the reputation came back malicious — otherwise just end
before_yaml:
collection: 00 - FSR Studio
playbooks:
- name: Suspicious IP Response
  is_active: true
  trigger_step_id: start
  parameters:
  - ip_to_investigate
  steps:
  - type: start
    name: Start
    module: alerts
    button_label: Respond
    next: Enrich IP
  - type: connector
    name: Enrich IP
    arguments:
      connector: cyops_utilities
      operation: no_op
      params: {}
    next: Block IP
  - type: connector
    name: Block IP
    arguments:
      connector: fortigate-firewall
      operation: block_ip
      params:
        method: Quarantine Based
        ip_addresses: '{{ vars.input.params.ip_to_investigate }}'
    next: End
  - type: connector
    name: End
    arguments:
      connector: cyops_utilities
      operation: no_op
      params: {}
notes: Rewiring, not appending: a decision step is inserted and Enrich IP's next: is repointed. The byte-identical rule still binds on every step the analyst did not name — a gratuitous rename of Block IP detaches its run history.
